title: amerimnon glabrum
intro: Amerimnon glabrum, also known as California buckthorn, is a deciduous shrub native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Amerimnon glabrum include its ability to treat fever, sore throats, and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
